ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
Language: c%23
Lightweight and powerful real-time audio/speech translation tool based on Windows LiveCaptions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
Language: c%23
🌈【C#/.NET/.NET Core学习、工作、面试指南】记录、收集和总结C#/.NET/.NET Core基础知识、学习路线、开发实战、编程技巧练习、学习视频、文章、书籍、项目框架、社区组织、开发必备工具、技术前沿周刊、常见面试题、面试须知、简历模板、人才招聘、以及自己在学习和工作中的一些微薄见解。希望能和大家一起学习，共同进步。如果本知识库能为您提供帮助，别忘了给予支持哦(关注、点赞、分享)💖。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ardalis/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ardalis/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template: A proven Clean Architecture Template for ASP.NET Core 10

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet-architecture/eShopOnWeb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet-architecture/eShopOnWeb
Language: c%23
Sample ASP.NET Core 8.0 reference application, now community supported: https://github.com/NimblePros/eShopOnWeb

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
Language: c%23
Production Grade Cloud-Ready .NET 10 Starter Kit (Web API + Blazor Client) with Multitenancy Support, and Clean/Modular Architecture that saves roughly 200+ Development Hours! All Batteries Included.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huynhsontung/Screenbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huynhsontung/Screenbox
Language: c%23
LibVLC-based media player for the Universal Windows Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spectreconsole/spectre.console
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spectreconsole/spectre.console
Language: c%23
A .NET library that makes it easier to create beautiful console applications.
